news.headline: Apertum Foundation challenges Texas regulator's crypto crusade with support from law firm Quinn Emanuel.
news.summary: Quinn Emanuel, a prominent law firm, has dismissed the Texas State Securities Board's (TSSB) recent claims as lacking merit. The Apertum Foundation and Josip Heit, a digital asset technology developer, have enlisted the services of Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan, LLP to counter an illegal cease-and-desist mandate. The development was reported on April 3, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: Scotch-Brite launches "The Brite Side of Clean" campaign with iconic song "So Fresh, So Clean" to transform cleaning experience. #1 scrub sponge brand in America.
news.summary: Scotch-Brite™, the top-selling scrub sponge brand in America, has introduced a fresh brand campaign in St. Paul, Minnesota on April 3, 2025, aiming to blend performance, design, and positive energy to transform cleaning into an uplifting activity. The innovative campaign is designed to evoke a feel-good experience for consumers and enhance their cleaning routine.

news.headline: UPLIZNA(R) approved for IgG4-Related Disease. 87% reduction in flares vs placebo. Corticosteroid-free, complete remission shown in MITIGATE trial.
news.summary: A recent CD19+ B-cell targeted therapy has demonstrated a significant impact, with an 87% reduction in the risk of flares compared to a placebo. The treatment, known as UPLIZNA, has led to complete remission without the need for corticosteroids, as well as a flare-free status for patients participating in the MITIGATE trial. This advancement marks a significant milestone for Amgen's leadership in CD19-directed therapy and B-cell depletion.

news.headline: Bob Taylor joins NEF as Chief Risk and Investment Officer to expand affordable housing preservation efforts in Chicago.
news.summary: NEF, a prominent non-profit investment manager specializing in multi-family affordable housing, has recently made a key addition to its executive team to enhance its risk management and investment expertise. The strategic appointment in the C-suite is intended to bolster NEF's capabilities in expanding the preservation and development of affordable housing. This development was announced in Chicago on April 3, 2025.

news.headline: ARDRI welcomes Carli Nall as Account Manager, boasting 32 years of industry experience to enhance TPO broker services.
news.summary: Located in Calabasas, California, ARDRI, a prominent company in intelligent non-QM lending, welcomes Carli Nall as their new Account Manager. With a robust experience of over 32 years in the mortgage industry, Carli started her career in 1992 in the retail sector, collaborating with mortgage brokers. Her addition reinforces ARDRI's commitment to providing top-notch service and technology to the TPO broker community. Carli Nall's extensive expertise, leadership skills, and track record of success further solidify ARDRI's position as a key player in the market.

news.headline: Chan Zuckerberg Initiative teams up with Scale Bio to accelerate single cell research at an unprecedented scale, aiming to process billions of cells.
news.summary: In San Diego, Scale Bio has partnered with Chan Zuckerberg Initiative's Billion Cells Project, marked as #CZBiohubNY. The collaboration aims to advance single cell research on a large scale, potentially reaching billions of cells.

news.headline: Robert Vargas paints new mural to raise awareness about hunger,  spreading hope and inspiration to 100,000+ passersby.
news.summary: In a recent update, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.5%, indicating an improvement in the job market. The number of new jobs created in the last month stood at 250,000, surpassing expectations. However, the inflation rate has slightly increased to 2.3%, leading to concerns about the economy's stability. Additionally, the GDP growth rate for the last quarter was recorded at 3.8%, showcasing moderate progress. Overall, the current economic indicators suggest a mixed outlook for the country's financial health.

news.headline: L3Harris delivers first missionized Skyraider II aircraft to US Air Force Special Operations cmd, supporting National Defense Strategy - critical for close air support and intel missions.
news.summary: In Hurlburt Field, Florida, L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) and Air Tractor have successfully handed over the inaugural missionized OA-1K Skyraider II aircraft to aid the U.S. Air Force Special Operations Command. This aircraft delivery marks a significant step in enhancing operational capabilities to better serve the objectives of the National Defense Strategy and the joint force. The Skyraider II aircraft is designated for use by Special Operations Forces (SOF) in a variety of missions, including providing close air support, executing precision strikes, and offering armed intelligence support. This collaboration aims to bolster the readiness and effectiveness of SOF while engaging in critical operations.

news.headline: National Wildlife Federation and Blink Camera partner for 'Eye on the Wild' to showcase wildlife in diverse habitats. Celebrates National Wildlife Week.
news.summary: In Reston, Virginia, on April 3, 2025, the National Wildlife Federation partnered with Blink Smart Home Security to introduce the 'Eye on the Wild' initiative. This campaign aims to showcase wildlife in surprising locations, encouraging individuals to safeguard distinct habitats such as forests, ponds, and private properties.

news.headline: Sarepta and Roche suspend Elevidys gene therapy trials in Europe after patient death from acute liver failure, EMA request.
news.summary: In March, Sarepta Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:SRPT) provided an update on Elevidys (delandistrogene moxeparvovec-rokl), the sole approved gene therapy for Duchenne muscular dystrophy. The company disclosed a patient fatality post-Elevidys treatment due to acute liver failure. Acute liver damage is a recognized potential adverse effect of Elevidys and similar AAV-mediated gene therapies, as mentioned in the prescribing information. Sarepta and Roche Holdings AG (OTC:RHHBY) decided to temporarily pause multiple clinical studies on Wednesday. Roche, the firm holding the treatment license outside the US, revealed this action was in response to the European Medicines Agency’s (EMA) directive. For further details, refer to the complete Benzinga.com article.

news.headline: 19th Annual Taste of Heritage Gala on April 26, 2025, celebrates Black culinary brilliance and culture.
news.summary: The 19th Annual Thomas W. Dortch, Jr. Taste of Heritage Gala is being hosted by the National Black College Alumni (NBCA) Hall of Fame Foundation, Inc. in Atlanta on April 3, 2025. The event serves as a vibrant celebration of Black culinary excellence, culture, and the lasting impact of a visionary.

news.headline: Multiply Mortgage hires Karen Mayfield as Nat'l Head of Originations, with 25+ years experience.
news.summary: In Denver, Multiply Mortgage has appointed Karen Mayfield as the National Head of Originations. With over 25 years of experience in mortgage and lending, including positions at Citi, Chase, and Wells Fargo, Mayfield will focus on driving growth and innovation while expanding the mortgage originators team. The company aims to enhance homeownership accessibility through employee benefits.

Goldman Sachs predicts EPS pressure on Capital Markets stocks due to market volatility. Analyst expects 30% downside to EPS estimates for Alternative Manager stocks. Brookfield Asset Management Inc (NYSE:BAM) stands out as resilient.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs analyst Alexander Blostein predicts that EPS forecasts for Capital Markets stocks will be impacted by macro and policy uncertainty, volatile equity markets, and decreasing short-term interest rates. Blostein's 2025 estimates are approximately 5% lower than the consensus, with the exception of Exchanges. He notes that Alternative Manager stocks are at risk of lower EPS due to reduced realization activity, potentially leading to a 30% decrease compared to Street estimates, along with a slower forecasted FRE growth rate of 11% in 2025E, down from around 15% previously. Blostein highlights Brookfield Asset Management Inc (NYSE:BAM) as one of the most resilient, likely benefiting from index inclusion. On the other hand, TPG Inc. (NASDAQ:TPG) and KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) are addressed as facing challenges, with further details available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Research suggests your cat may be a descendant of ancient Egyptian pharaohs. SHEBA® brand is searching for a royal successor.
news.summary: A new campaign by the SHEBA® brand aims to identify the royal heir among cats who deserves to enjoy their latest product, SHEBA SELECTIONS Filets. With the initiative launched in Franklin, Tenn. on April 3, 2025, the brand commemorates the age-old bond between cats and humans. This initiative pays homage to the historical connections cats have had with humans since ancient Egypt when they held a revered position.

news.headline: Shingles vaccine linked to 20% lower dementia risk per new study. Data from 282,541 adults in Wales analyzed.
news.summary: Recent research examined the potential link between the shingles vaccine and dementia prevention. Previous studies have suggested a connection between certain herpes viruses and dementia, leading to the hypothesis that vaccines could provide immune benefits. The study, published in Nature on Wednesday, analyzed data from 282,541 older adults in Wales. Results showed that individuals who had received the original shingles live virus vaccine were 20% less likely to develop dementia compared to those who were not vaccinated. Shingles, caused by the varicella-zoster virus, is a painful rash illness that reactivates in the body after chickenpox. The findings underscore the potential cognitive benefits of the shingles vaccine. In other news, the Trump administration is considering significant cuts to domestic HIV prevention programs, leading to a decline in Gilead stock.

news.headline: Toll Brothers is selling final homes in The Meadows, Lake Forest, CA - a master-planned community in Orange County.

This community offers a range of amenities and is situated in a prime location within Orange County. With only a few homes left, these properties are in high demand and are selling fast. Don't miss out on this opportunity to own a home in this sought-after community in Orange County. Contact us for more information before it's too late.

news.headline: Jordan Murphy appointed Director of Wrestling & Head of Academy Wrestling at The St. James in Springfield, VA. Former NCAA All-American takes on new roles.

Murphy, a former NCAA All-American, is known for his success in building acclaimed wrestling programs. news.headline: NMTCs allocate $19.5 M to Potters Industries in Wilson, NC, aiding job creation and production revival.
news.summary: In Forest City, Iowa on April 3, 2025, Rural Development Partners (RDP) provided Potters Industries, LLC with $19.5 million in New Markets Tax Credit (NMTC) funding. Potters Industries is renowned for producing glass beads used in retroreflective highway safety items. This investment aims to boost the rural community and enhance safety measures on the roads.

news.headline: Loar Holdings rises in ratings, SmartSelect Composite Rating jumps from 94 to 98, making it stand out.
news.summary: Loar Holdings experienced a rise in its IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating on Thursday, climbing from 94 to 98. The Young Loar stock surged to the forefront of high-performing stocks and received a notable rating upgrade.

news.headline: Spotify announces new initiatives to increase advertising revenue, receives positive feedback from stock analysts.
news.summary: Spotify Technology, a popular music and podcast streaming platform, has revealed new strategies aimed at increasing its advertising income. Industry analysts have expressed optimism about the move. The company is making a concerted effort to enhance its advertising revenue through the introduction of innovative tools and partnerships. This development has garnered a positive response from Spotify stock analysts who view it as a step in the right direction for the company.

news.headline: Stocks of Meta, Snap, Reddit, and Pinterest drop over tariff concerns impacting digital advertising spending.
news.summary: Stock prices of Meta and other social media companies experienced a decline on Thursday due to worries that tariffs could deter expenditure on digital advertising. Meta, Snap, Reddit, and Pinterest all saw a slide as tariffs were seen to contribute to the 'Digital Ads Volatility'. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Global stock markets fell due to U.S. tariffs, except for one that rose on Thursday - not specified.
news.summary: Global markets experienced a widespread downturn due to U.S. tariffs impacting the global economy, including a noticeable sell-off in the U.S. stock market. However, there were a few exceptions to this trend, with some markets recording an increase. Notably, only one major world stock market saw positive movements on Thursday amidst this broader decline.

news.headline: US lawmakers move forward on anti-CBDC bill with 27-22 vote. 114 cosponsors, aiming to bar federal issuance of digital currencies.
news.summary: The US House Financial Services Committee approved the CBDC Anti-Surveillance State Act with a 27-22 vote, one of five bills discussed in a recent session. Representative Tom Emmer, the bill's sponsor, highlighted its previous support with a 216-192 vote last Congress and currently boasting 114 cosponsors. The bill aims to prevent federal banks from engaging with CBDCs, reflecting concerns over financial privacy issues. Additionally, Republican lawmakers, including Senator Ted Cruz, are showing bipartisan support for preventing the development of CBDCs, echoing sentiments from the Trump administration. While the bill's journey to becoming law remains uncertain, it signals a growing opposition to CBDCs within political circles and industry leaders.

news.headline: Technology companies are impacted by Trump's tariff policies, causing concern among smartphone and hardware manufacturers.
Joe Jackson and crew will row nonstop for 157 miles on Rogue River to raise funds for son battling Duchenne muscular dystrophy.
news.summary: In Medford, Oregon, a group led by Joe Jackson, along with Jeremy Leever and Shaun Olson, will undertake a challenging endeavor on April 25th. They will row nonstop overnight for 157 miles along the Rogue River. This initiative aims to raise awareness and essential funds for Joe's son, William Jackson, who is fighting Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD). The usual 10-day journey will be compressed into one intense push, highlighting the critical need for a cure for DMD.

news.headline: Ex-employee claims getting $5,000 in ETH monthly to spy for rival against Rippling.
news.summary: An ex-worker at Rippling claimed that he was paid $5,000 worth of ETH monthly to gather information on the company for rival Deel.

news.headline: T.W. Garner recalls Texas Pete® Habanero Buffalo Sauce for undeclared sulfites & mislabeled CHAbanero Sauce in NC.
news.summary: In Winston Salem, North Carolina, on April 3, 2025, T.W. Garner Food Company announced a recall of specific lots and sizes of Texas Pete® Habanero Buffalo Sauce due to a packaging error that included Sriracha Sauce in some bottles. The Sriracha Sauce contains sulfites, which are not listed on the label. Consumers are advised to check the table below for affected products. It is crucial to be aware of this issue and take necessary precautions.

news.headline: New docuseries "Cancel Nation" to explore cultural fault lines in America, examines impact of cancel culture on individuals.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on April 3, 2025, a new docuseries called "Cancel Nation" is exploring the repercussions of standing up for one's beliefs in the face of public scrutiny. The series delves into the consequences of personal sacrifice in the age of cancel culture, where a single viewpoint can lead to widespread backlash. By shedding light on the cultural divisions of today, "Cancel Nation" challenges viewers to consider the price of taking a stance in a society where personal struggles are often turned into public entertainment. This thought-provoking series aims to spark conversations about the complexities of modern values and the power of social influence. Stay tuned to witness the exploration of these timely themes in the rapidly evolving landscape of social media and public opinion.

news.headline: SAFE, an AI-powered cyber risk management firm, recognized as a leader by Liminal for exceptional product capability.
news.summary: SAFE, a renowned company based in Palo Alto, California, was recently recognized for its exceptional product capability, AI-powered automation, and high practitioner satisfaction. news.headline: Pawfit trackers promote healthy pet routines, article addresses benefits of morning family routines.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in Los Angeles and Liverpool, England, dogs are celebrating the arrival of spring. With the changing season, it's a great time to shake up our routines. Consider incorporating morning family time, regular cleaning habits, and exercise into your daily schedule. Embracing these changes can bring numerous benefits to both humans and their furry companions.

news.headline: Analyst warns of potential S&P 500 and Bitcoin downturn, as historical trends may lead to further decline in April.
news.summary: Analysts are predicting a continued decline for the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY) and Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) due to technical indicators and macro-economic factors. Renowned analyst Benjamin Cowen cautioned in a recent podcast that the S&P 500's drop could persist until April, resembling previous market downturns affecting both stocks and cryptocurrencies. While historically March has been a turning point during corrections like the financial crisis and pandemic crash, Cowen suggests that downturns could extend into April. Of note is mid-April, when the next inflation data will be released, carrying the spotlight due to new tariffs and keeping investors on edge. This information is detailed on Benzinga.com for further insights.

news.headline: White House annex now shows tariff on South Korea at 25%.
Solana's SOL price drops 12.75% to $112.50 in 24 hours due to Trump tariffs, negative futures basis and funding rates, and technical factors.
news.summary: Solana's native token, SOL, has experienced a significant drop of almost 12.75% in the past 24 hours, hitting a three-week low of $112.50 on April 3. This decline can be attributed to various factors, including the latest round of tariffs imposed by the Trump administration, negative futures basis and funding rates, and several technical factors. The drop in SOL's price is connected to fading demand in its futures market, as seen in the decreasing annualized rolling basis on three-month contracts. Additionally, SOL's funding rates have turned negative, indicating a weakening bullish momentum in the market. The current trend suggests a bearish continuation pattern for SOL, with the possibility of prices declining further to $96.

news.headline: Kateryna Odarchenko leads IGAPA at the 10th International Forum in Washington, D.C., hosted by Bay Atlantic University.
